projects.title: URICA: Pathology Slide Retrieval System
projects.intro: This work introduces the Unified Region-based Affine Identifier Retrieval Algorithm (URICA) to address region-level representation challenges in whole slide image retrieval, achieving rotation- and scale-invariant matching via semantic tessellation and affinity consistency, with theoretical proof of pixel-level retrieval approximation.
projects.description: This work introduces the Unified Region-based Affine Identifier Retrieval Algorithm (URICA) to address region-level representation challenges in whole slide image retrieval, achieving rotation- and scale-invariant matching via semantic tessellation and affinity consistency, with theoretical proof of pixel-level retrieval approximation.

patent.name: Pathological Image Retrieval Method, Electronic Device and Medium
applicants: Guangzhou Amboway Medical Technology Co., Ltd.
